title: TOP-VIGOR 3Pcs 8mm Nut Setter Driver Drill Bit Set, 1/4 inch Hex Shank Quick Change, 150mm Length Metric Nut Driver Set for Woodworking, Auto Repairing, Machine Maintenance, Furnitures
features: 【Size & Package】1/4 inch Quick-Change Hex Shank, 8mm nut driver, 150mm total length. Package content: 3 x Quick-Change Hex Shank.
【Durable Material】Crafted from heat-treated chrome vanadium steel and finished with sandblasting for enhanced hardness and corrosion resistance, ensuring long-lasting durability.
【Universal 1/4" Hex Shank】Compatible with a wide range of quick-change chucks, drills, drivers, or screw-guns, the 1/4 inch hex shanks offer versatility and ease of use.
【Magnetic】Equipped with a magnetic nut setter, which securely grabs nuts and fasteners when used with an impact/bit driver or hex socket ratchet, facilitating easy installation or loosening/removal.
【Versatile Application】Suitable for a variety of applications, including home improvement projects, professional tasks, and various labor-intensive activities.
description: Product Description Quick-Change Hex Shank Our Quick-Change Hex Shank is built for durability and ease of use. Compatible with corded and cordless drills, as well as pneumatic, electric, and manual screwdrivers, it's ideal for woodworking, carpentry, machining, and auto repair. This set makes a perfect gift for any handyman! The Installation Steps Details Premium Quality The hex shank is crafted from top-grade chrome vanadium steel, offering high hardness and wear resistance, perfect for heavy-duty tasks. Powerful Magnetic Grip The head features a strong magnetic design with a high bite to minimize screw loss, ensuring convenience and speed. Secure Tail Slot Design The tail slot design prevents slipping during operation, providing reliable performance. Versatile Use Compatible with tools like electric blowers and hand drills for various applications. Widely Used Ideal for home improvement, DIY projects, woodworking, professional machine work, contractor repairs, labor and manpower more.
